mapper.select:
SELECT POHD.GATE_CD , PODT.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , PODT.BUYER_DEPT_NM AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , PODT.PR_DEPT_NM AS DEPT_NM , PODT.PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS ,(POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.PO_NUM , POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM , CASE WHEN GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE GETFILECOUNT(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.ATT_FILE_NUM) END AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT , POHD.SUBJECT , POHD.PO_AMT , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_DATE , POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS VENDOR_RECEIPT_USER_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_REJECT_RMK , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS INSPECT_USER_TYPE , (SELECT CVUR.COMPANY_CD FROM STOCCVUR CVUR WHERE CVUR.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) AS INSPECT_USER_COMPANY , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG , POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_DATE , POHD.CUR , POHD.VAT_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '1' THEN TRUNC(POHD.PO_AMT / 11) WHEN POHD.VAT_TYPE = '2' THEN TRUNC(POHD.PO_AMT * 0.1) ELSE 0 END) AS VAT_AMT , TRUNC((IVDT.INV_QT, 0) * (IVDT.UNIT_PRC, 0)) AS INS_AMT , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE , POPY.PAY_PERCENT , POPY.PAY_AMT , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT , (SELECT ECCT.CONT_REQ_CD FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_REQ_CD , (SELECT (ECCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = '100' AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT - 1) AS B_CONT_START_DATE , (SELECT (ECCT.CONT_START_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = '100' AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_START_DATE , (SELECT (ECCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = '100' AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT - 1) AS B_CONT_END_DATE , (SELECT (ECCT.CONT_END_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') FROM STOCECCT ECCT WHERE ECCT.GATE_CD = '100' AND ECCT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND ECCT.CONT_NUM = PODT.CONT_NUM AND ECCT.CONT_CNT = PODT.CONT_CNT) AS CONT_END_DATE FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN (SELECT PODT.GATE_CD , POHD.BUYER_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD, POHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , PODT.CONT_NUM , PODT.CONT_CNT FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = '200' AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG = '0'
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
GROUP BY PODT.GATE_CD, POHD.BUYER_CD , POHD.DEPT_CD, POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD, PODT.PR_DEPT_CD, PODT.CONT_NUM, PODT.CONT_CNT ) PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM) JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PAY_CNT , SUM((IVDT.INV_QT, 0)) AS INV_QT , MAX(IVDT.UNIT_PRC) AS UNIT_PRC FROM STOCIVDT IVDT WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PAY_CNT) IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVDT.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT) LEFT JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND IVGH.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND POHD.VENDOR_RECEIPT_STATUS = '200' AND POHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI' AND POHD.FORCE_CLOSE_FLAG = '0' AND IVGH.INV_NUM IS NULL -- 검수요청서가 작성되지 않은 건
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND POPY.PAY_DUE_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
ORDER BY POHD.PO_NUM DESC, POPY.PAY_CNT

SELECT MAX(A.PAY_CNT) AS PAY_CNT FROM ( SELECT MAX(IVDT.PAY_CNT) AS PAY_CNT FROM STOCPODT PODT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PODT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PODT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND PODT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} - 1 AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' UNION SELECT MAX(IVDT.PAY_CNT) AS PAY_CNT FROM STOCPODT PODT JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE PODT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND PODT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND PODT.CONT_NUM = #{CONT_NUM} AND PODT.CONT_CNT = #{CONT_CNT} AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A WHERE 1=1

SELECT POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , POHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , #{ses.userId} AS PIC_USER_ID , #{ses.userNm} AS PIC_USER_NM , #{ses.telNum} AS PIC_TEL_NUM , #{ses.cellNum} AS PIC_CELL_NUM , POHD.CUR AS CUR , POHD.VAT_TYPE AS VAT_TYPE , (POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_NUM AS PO_NUM , POHD.SUBJECT AS SUBJECT , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE AS PAY_TERMS , POHD.PO_AMT AS PO_AMT , POHD.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , POHD.DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_CNT AS PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM AS PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_PERCENT AS PAY_PERCENT , POPY.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , 0 AS INV_AMT , 0 AS VAT_AMT , VNGL.IRS_NO , NULL AS PROGRESS_CD FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POHD.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT}

SELECT IVGH.INV_NUM AS INV_NUM , IVHD.VENDOR_CD AS VENDOR_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , IVGH.VENDOR_USER_NM AS PIC_USER_NM , IVGH.VENDOR_TEL_NUM AS PIC_TEL_NUM , IVGH.VENDOR_CELL_NUM AS PIC_CELL_NUM , IVHD.CUR AS CUR , IVHD.VAT_TYPE AS VAT_TYPE , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , (POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PO_CREATE_DATE , POHD.PO_NUM AS PO_NUM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID AS CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID AS INSPECT_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS INSPECT_USER_NM , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE AS PAY_TERMS , POHD.PO_AMT AS PO_AMT , IVHD.BUYER_CD AS BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_CNT AS PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM AS PAY_CNT_NM , POPY.PAY_PERCENT AS PAY_PERCENT , POPY.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , IVHD.INV_AMT , IVHD.VAT_AMT , IVGH.RMK_TEXT_NUM , IVGH.ATT_FILE_NUM , (IVGH.SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SEND_DATE , IVGH.SUBJECT , IVHD.GUAR_TYPE , IVHD.GUAR_PERCENT , IVHD.GUAR_QT , IVHD.VAT_FLAG , IVHD.GUAR_AMT , IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 , IVHD.GUARANTEER , IVHD.ATT_FILE_NUM AS GUAR_ATT_FILE_NUM , IVHD.RMK , IVHD.INSU_STATUS , IVHD.GUAR_NUM , VNGL.IRS_NO , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN STOCVNGL VNGL ON (VNGL.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND VNGL.VENDOR_CD = IVHD.VENDOR_CD AND VNGL.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM}

SELECT IVDT.INV_SQ , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , IVDT.ITEM_CD , IVDT.ITEM_DESC , IVDT.ITEM_SPEC , IVDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(IVDT.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, 'MK', IVDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , IVDT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.PO_QT , IVDT.UNIT_CD , IVDT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , IVDT.INV_QT AS INV_QT , IVDT.INV_QT AS OLD_INV_QT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS INV_AMT , IVDT.ITEM_AMT AS OLD_INV_AMT , IVDT.VAT_AMT AS VAT_AMT , (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS SUM_INV_QT -- 납품수량(=요청완료, 승인) , (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS SUM_INV_AMT -- 납품금액(=요청완료, 승인) , PODT.PO_QT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.INV_QT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS PO_RE_QT -- 납품가능수량 , PODT.ITEM_AMT + (CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') THEN 0 ELSE (IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) END) - (SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS PO_RE_AMT -- 납품가능금액 , IVHD.BUYER_CD , IVHD.DEPT_CD , IVDT.PR_BUYER_CD , IVDT.PR_DEPT_CD FROM STOCIVHD IVHD JOIN STOCIVDT IVDT ON (IVDT.GATE_CD = IVHD.GATE_CD AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = IVHD.BUYER_CD AND IVDT.INV_NUM = IVHD.INV_NUM AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = IVDT.PO_NUM AND PODT.PO_SQ = IVDT.PO_SQ AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '700') -- 요청완료(100), 승인(700) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('50', '500') -- 작성중(50), 반려(500) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM2_IVDT ON (SUM2_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE IVHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVHD.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT POHD.PO_NUM , PODT.PO_SQ , PODT.PR_NUM , PODT.PR_SQ , PODT.ITEM_CD , PODT.ITEM_DESC , PODT.ITEM_SPEC , PODT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(PODT.GATE_CD, PODT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', PODT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , PODT.MAKER_PART_NO , PODT.ORIGIN_CD , PODT.PO_QT , PODT.UNIT_CD , PODT.UNIT_PRC , PODT.ITEM_AMT , POHD.CTRL_CD , PODT.PO_WT_NUM , PODT.PURCHASE_TYPE , POHD.BUYER_CD , POHD.DEPT_CD , PODT.PR_BUYER_CD , PODT.PR_DEPT_CD , (PODT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DUE_DATE , (PODT.RMK) AS RMK , PODT.EXEC_NUM , 0 AS INV_QT , 0 AS OLD_INV_QT , 0 AS INV_AMT , 0 AS OLD_INV_AMT , 0 AS VAT_AMT , (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS SUM_INV_QT -- 납품수량(=요청완료, 승인, 반려) , (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS SUM_INV_AMT -- 납품금액 , PODT.PO_QT - (SUM2_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.INV_QT, 0) AS PO_RE_QT -- 납품가능수량(=발주수량-작성수량-승인/요청완료/반려수량) , PODT.ITEM_AMT - (SUM2_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) - (SUM_IVDT.ITEM_AMT, 0) AS PO_RE_AMT -- 납품가능금액 , PODT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCPOHD POHD JOIN STOCPODT PODT ON (PODT.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND PODT.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND PODT.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND PODT.DEL_FLAG = '0') LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD IN ('100', '500', '700') -- 요청완료(100), 승인(700), 반려(500) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM_IVDT ON (SUM_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) LEFT JOIN (SELECT IVDT.GATE_CD , IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM , IVDT.PO_SQ , SUM(IVDT.INV_QT) AS INV_QT , SUM(IVDT.ITEM_AMT) AS ITEM_AMT FROM STOCIVDT IVDT JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVDT.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVDT.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVDT.INV_NUM AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '50' -- 작성중(50) AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVDT.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVDT.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY IVDT.GATE_CD, IVDT.BUYER_CD , IVDT.PO_NUM, IVDT.PO_SQ) SUM2_IVDT ON (SUM2_IVDT.GATE_CD = PODT.GATE_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.BUYER_CD = PODT.BUYER_CD AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_NUM = PODT.PO_NUM AND SUM2_IVDT.PO_SQ = PODT.PO_SQ) WHERE POHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POHD.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY PODT.PO_SQ

SELECT IVGH.BUYER_CD , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , IVHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT ,(SELECT PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY WHERE GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND VENDOR_CD = IVGH.VENDOR_CD AND PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND DEL_FLAG = '0') AS PAY_AMT FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM) WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY IVGH.INV_NUM DESC

SELECT POPY.PO_NUM , POPY.PAY_CNT , POPY.PAY_CNT_TYPE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , POPC.PY_BUYER_CD , POPC.PY_DEPT_CD ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(POPC.GATE_CD, POPC.PY_BUYER_CD, POPC.PY_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PY_BUYER_DEPT_NM , POPC.PAY_AMT AS PAY_AMT , POPC.RMK , POHD.PAY_TYPE , POPY.PAY_PERCENT , POPC.CONT_NUM , POPC.CONT_CNT , POPC.PR_BUYER_CD , POPC.PR_DEPT_CD , POPY.PAY_METHOD_TYPE AS PAY_TERMS FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPC POPC ON (POPC.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND POPC.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND POPC.DEPT_CD = POPY.DEPT_CD AND POPC.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND POPC.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND POPC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = #{PAY_CNT} AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT SUM(INV_AMT) AS INV_AMT , SUM(PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM ( SELECT (SUM(IVHD.INV_AMT), 0) AS INV_AMT , MAX(POPY.PAY_AMT) AS PAY_AMT FROM STOCPOPY POPY JOIN STOCIVGH IVGH ON (IVGH.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVGH.PO_NUM = POPY.PO_NUM AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = POPY.VENDOR_CD AND IVGH.PAY_CNT = POPY.PAY_CNT AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = POPY.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = POPY.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE POPY.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND POPY.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND POPY.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM} AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND POPY.PAY_CNT <= #{PAY_CNT} AND POPY.PAY_CNT = CASE WHEN (SELECT MAX(IVGH.INV_NUM) FROM STOCIVGH IVGH WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.PO_NUM = #{PO_NUM}) IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE POPY.PAY_CNT END AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY POPY.PAY_CNT )

SELECT A.* , CVUR.MAIL_FLAG , CVUR.SMS_FLAG ,GETUSERNAME(A.GATE_CD, A.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM -- 2021.06.30 : SMS 수수료 추가 ,(SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = A.BUYER_CD) AS CORP_NO , CVUR.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , A.PIC_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'INV' '@@' A.BUYER_CD '@@' A.INV_NUM AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM ( SELECT IVGH.GATE_CD , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVHD.VENDOR_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.VENDOR_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS VENDOR_NM , IVGH.BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(IVGH.GATE_CD, IVGH.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID ,GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , IVGH.SUBJECT ,(IVGH.INV_SEND_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SEND_DATE ,(IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, POHD.INSPECT_USER_ID) AS PIC_USER_ID FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND IVGH.INV_NUM = #{INV_NUM} ) A JOIN STOCCVUR CVUR ON (CVUR.GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND CVUR.USER_ID = A.PIC_USER_ID) WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT IVHD.BUYER_CD , GETCOMPANYNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_NM , IVHD.DEPT_CD , GETDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS DEPT_NM , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.BUYER_CD, IVHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , IVHD.PROGRESS_CD ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.GUAR_TYPE2 = '20' THEN '1' ELSE '0' END) AS GUAR_YN , IVGH.INV_NUM , IVGH.SEND_DATE , IVGH.SUBJECT , POHD.SUBJECT AS PO_SUBJECT , POHD.PO_CREATE_TYPE , IVGH.PO_NUM , POHD.PO_CREATE_DATE , IVHD.INV_DATE , POPY.PAY_CNT_NM , IVGH.PAY_CNT , POHD.CUR , IVHD.INV_AMT , POPY.PAY_AMT , IVHD.PIC_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS PIC_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(IVHD.GATE_CD, IVHD.PIC_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS PIC_USER_TYPE , POHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(POHD.GATE_CD, POHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '500' THEN IVGH.REJECT_DATE ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_DATE ,(CASE WHEN IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = '500' THEN IVGH.REJECT_RMK ELSE NULL END) AS REJECT_RMK FROM STOCIVGH IVGH JOIN STOCIVHD IVHD ON (IVHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND IVHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND IVHD.INV_NUM = IVGH.INV_NUM AND IVHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOHD POHD ON (POHD.GATE_CD = IVGH.GATE_CD AND POHD.BUYER_CD = IVGH.BUYER_CD AND POHD.PO_NUM = IVGH.PO_NUM AND POHD.DEL_FLAG = '0') JOIN STOCPOPY POPY ON (POPY.GATE_CD = POHD.GATE_CD AND POPY.BUYER_CD = POHD.BUYER_CD AND POPY.PO_NUM = POHD.PO_NUM AND POPY.DEPT_CD = POHD.DEPT_CD AND POPY.VENDOR_CD = POHD.VENDOR_CD AND POPY.PAY_CNT = IVGH.PAY_CNT AND POPY.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE IVGH.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND IVGH.VENDOR_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND IVGH.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND IVHD.DELIVERY_TYPE = 'PI'
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVGH.SEND_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE >= (#{FROM_DATE})
AND IVHD.INV_DATE <= (#{TO_DATE})
AND UPPER(POHD.PO_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{PO_NUM}) '%'
AND UPPER(POHD.SUBJECT) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{SUBJECT}) '%'
AND UPPER(IVHD.INV_NUM) LIKE '%' UPPER(#{INV_NUM}) '%'
AND IVHD.PROGRESS_CD = #{PROGRESS_CD}
ORDER BY IVHD.INV_NUM DESC
